tagline: Lakebase (Autoscaling Beta) is now available on AWS as a new app in the app switcher, separate from the existing Lakebase Public Preview.
what_it_does: Lakebase (Autoscaling Beta) is now available on AWS as a new app in the app switcher, separate from the existing Lakebase Public Preview. This new version introduces autoscaling, scale to zero, database branching, instant restore, and project based organization with a redesigned UI. By the end of this guide, you'll have a running Postgres database with sample data, ready to connect to your application or integrate with the Databricks lakehouse.
why_it_matters: This new version introduces autoscaling, scale to zero, database branching, instant restore, and project based organization with a redesigned UI.
